title: FITPAC classification ontology (machine)
description: Deterministic typing policy for prose→feature ledger. Normative human commentary: fitpac_classification_ontology_v0.1.0.md
disambiguation_hints: Menu/UI: ontological_role ui_artifact; primitives Boundary or Projection — not Entity.
User input: interaction_event + boundary_input → Boundary (not Transformation).
Players/users: external_actor → Entity and/or Relation — not Authority.
Scope qualifiers (easy, online): scope_qualifier → Context — not Entity or Authority.
Game rules: rule_statement + control_semantics invariant → Constraint (not Entity or Transformation).
Win overlays / smiley / growing animations on screen: ui_artifact → Projection (or Boundary for static chrome) — not Transformation; ui_artifact allows only Boundary and Projection.
